description.value:
Of the bloodlines, teal is the most commonly found among madrosarais. This bloodline is known to represent the most dedicated of workers and those seeking to serve their species and the wider needs of the Virtuum. With this blood in your veins, you gain access to a greater resilience that you can employ while performing your duties.

You gain the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.Madrosarai Tenacity] reaction.
